title: Sunburst Macrame Mirror
excerpt: Create a stunning sunburst-style mirror that will be the focal point of any room.

steps.title: Create inner ring
steps.description: Wrap the embroidery hoop with thin cord and attach the mirror in the center.

steps.title: Add ray cords
steps.description: Cut varying lengths of cord and attach around the hoop pointing outward.

steps.title: Decorate rays
steps.description: Add knots and wooden beads at different points along the rays for visual interest.

steps.title: Shape and finish
steps.description: Arrange rays in a pleasing sunburst pattern and trim ends at varying lengths.

tips: Odd numbers of rays look more natural
Mix cord thicknesses for added texture
